creator: dmk@ncf.ca
text: Hi Gerald, I apologize for not getting back to this sooner. After a long, drawn-out upgrade process (I like building my own ports, and ran into some complications with poudriere after upgrading to 14.0-RELEASE-p4) I got updated to wine-8.0.2_1,1 today. I can no longer replicate my problem, so I am marking this closed.
